summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Health Tracker MVP - all core features working correctly including authentication, health logging, analytics, and data persistence
passed_tests: All 8 backend API endpoints working (auth/register, auth/login, auth/me, health/log, health/entries, health/stats, goals creation, goals retrieval)
Landing page loads correctly with hero section and call-to-action buttons
User registration flow works with form validation
User login flow works with existing credentials
JWT token authentication and persistence across page refreshes
Dashboard displays correctly with health metric cards
Log health entry modal works with all health metrics (weight, steps, water, sleep, calories, exercise, notes)
Health data displays in dashboard cards after logging
Recent entries list shows logged health data
Analytics view loads with charts and navigation
Back navigation from analytics to dashboard works
Logout functionality works and redirects to landing page
Data persistence across user sessions verified
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
